ogTitle: Bears Lagoon vs Beauchamp: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bears Lagoon and Beauchamp.
heading: Bears Lagoon vs Beauchamp — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bears Lagoon, Victoria and Beauchamp, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Beauchamp has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Bears Lagoon (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bears Lagoon or Beauchamp safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bears Lagoon has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Beauchamp scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bears Lagoon scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Beauchamp scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bears Lagoon or Beauchamp?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Beauchamp has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
